name: Growisto On Demand Sales Brain Digest

jsonBody.query: query($from: String, $to: String) { transcripts(limit: 100, fromDate: $from, toDate: $to) { id title date duration summary { short_summary action_items keywords } participants } }

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const prompt = `You are the Growisto Sales-Marketing AI Brain's on-demand digest engine. 

Window: since last digest through ${d.dateLabel}
Meetings processed: ${d.totalMeetings}

MEETING DATA:
${d.meetingContext}

Generate a digest markdown file covering this whole window. Return ONLY the markdown, no preamble.

REQUIRED FORMAT:
---
title: Digest — through ${d.dateLabel}
type: log
tags: [journal, on-demand-digest]
updated: ${d.dateLabel}
owner: auto
---

# Digest — through ${d.dateLabel}

> On-demand Fireflies digest. ${d.totalMeetings} meeting(s) processed across the window.

## Key updates by workstream

[For EACH category found in the meeting data, write a concise section with decisions, shipped items, and in-progress work across ALL meetings in this window, not just the most recent one. Max 6 bullet points per section.]

## Action items by owner

| Owner | Action Item | Source | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
[Extract ALL action items across every meeting in the window. Assign: high (urgent/blockers), mid (this week), low (backlog).]

## Blockers and decisions pending

[Explicitly blocked items or decisions awaiting input, across the whole window. If none: "None flagged."]

## Carry-forwards

[Items deferred or marked ongoing. If none: "None."]

RULES:
- Extract action items from ALL meeting categories, across the full window
- For AI Progress meetings, extract ONLY sales and marketing relevant items
- Be concise and actionable
- Never invent information not in the meeting data
- If the same topic appears in multiple meetings across the window, consolidate rather than repeating`;

return [{ json: { prompt, branchName: d.branchName, filePath: d.filePath, dateLabel: d.dateLabel, totalMeetings: d.totalMeetings } }];

arguments.pr_body: ={{ "On-demand Fireflies digest. " + $json.totalMeetings + " meeting(s) since last pull. Review and merge." }}

jsonBody.text: ={{ "📋 *On-demand Brain Digest — through " + $json.dateLabel + "* — " + $json.totalMeetings + " meeting(s) processed. PR open for review → https://github.com/your-org/your-planning-repo/pulls" }}
={{ "ℹ️ On-demand Brain Digest — through " + $json.dateLabel + ": no relevant meetings found in the window. No PR created." }}
